sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: TORONTO DOMINION BANK의 공시는 사업·재무 업데이트와 주요 확인사항을 제공합니다.

keyPoints.text: TORONTO DOMINION BANK는 최근 사업·재무 업데이트를 공시했습니다.

riskChanges.text: 위험요인 또는 공시 본문은 규제, 사업 운영, 계약 구조 관련 불확실성을 확인합니다.

businessChanges.text: 사업 및 영업 검토는 제품, 시장, 매출 구조 또는 운영 업데이트를 설명합니다.

financialHighlights.text: 공시는 실적, 배당, 매출 또는 재무 업데이트 관련 내용을 제공합니다.

watchItems.text: 향후 확인할 점은 이번 공시의 사업 업데이트가 다음 실적과 현금흐름으로 이어지는지입니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 ex991.htm NEWS RELEASE DATED JUNE 4, 2026 EXHIBIT 99.1 TD Announces Pricing of CAD Non-Viability Contingent Capital AT1 Limited Recourse Capital Notes NOT FOR DISTRIBUTION TO U.S. NEWSWIRE SERVICES OR FOR DISSEMINATION IN THE UNITED STATES TORONTO, June 4, 2026 /CNW/ - The Toronto-Dominion Bank ("TD") (TSX: TD) (NYSE: TD) today announced the pricing of a Canadian public offering of C$1.25 billion of 5.918% Non-Viability Contingent Capital (“NVCC”) Additional Tier 1 (“AT1”) Limited Recourse Capital Notes Series 7 (the “LRCNs”). The LRCNs will bear interest at a rate of 5.918 per cent annually, payable quarterly, for the initial period ending on, but excluding, July 31, 2031. Thereafter, the interest rate on the LRCNs will be reset every five years based on the prevailing 5-year Government of Canada Yield plus 2.85 per cent. The LRCNs will mature on July  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.25 billion = 12억 5,000만 달러; $1.25 = 1.25달러; 5.918 per cent = 5.918%; 2.85 per cent = 2.85%.

the United States or in any other jurisdiction where such offer, solicitation or sale would be unlawful. About TD Bank Group The Toronto-Dominion Bank and its subsidiaries are collectively known as TD Bank Group ("TD" or the "Bank"). TD is the sixth largest bank in North America by assets and serves 28.1 million clients in four key businesses operating in a number of locations in financial centres around the globe: Canadian Personal and Commercial Banking, including TD Canada Trust and TD Auto Finance Canada; U.S. Banking, including TD Auto Finance U.S. and TD Wealth (U.S.); Wealth Management and Insurance, including TD Wealth (Canada), TD Direct Investing, and TD Insurance; and Wholesale Banking, including TD Securities and TD Cowen. TD also ranks among North America's leading digital banks, with more than 13 million active mobile users in Canada and the U.S. TD  Normalized numeric aliases: 28.1 million = 2,810만 달러; 13 million = 1,300만 달러; $2.1 trillion = 2조 1,000억 달러; $2.1 = 2.1달러.

qualityFlags: Financial data reflects 2026-06-04 foreign issuer report
